CustomField.description: Per-template opt-in for the scoring + findings runtime (Pillar 5). When false, FormAnswerScoringTrigger short-circuits and the renderer hides score badges / findings panels. Separate from FieldForms_Configuration__c.Scoring_Enabled__c, which is the org-wide kill switch; BOTH must be true for any scoring work to run. Default false preserves backward compatibility on existing templates.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Turn on to compute pass/fail and create findings for this template's answers. Each question's catalog entry needs a Pass_Criteria__c and Weight__c set before this is meaningful.
CustomField.label: Scoring Enabled
